name: New Client Welcome & Setup Flow
description: Triggered on deal close - sends welcome email, creates client folder, assigns tasks, schedules kickoff call, notifies team.

client_variables.google_drive_parent_folder: ID of parent folder where client folders are created

setup_steps: Create Google Drive folder template structure
Draft welcome email template with client's branding
Set up Calendly event type for kickoff calls
Build n8n workflow: CRM trigger → parallel actions
Configure Slack notification with client summary
Set up task creation in PM tool (Notion/ClickUp/Asana)
Test full flow with a dummy client
Document for client's team so they know what happens automatically
n8n_workflow_nodes: Google Drive - Create client folder from template
Calendly - Generate booking link for kickoff
Slack - Notify team with client details
HTTP Request - Create tasks in PM tool
Google Sheets - Log new client to master tracker
kpis_to_track: Client response time to welcome email
